prestazioni: Engine: Skyactiv-G 2.5T PY-VPTS (2588cc, direct-injection turbo) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons for 30+ psi boost capability. Precision Turbo & Engine PT6766 CEA turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 64mm inducer, and 76mm exducer, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors (1700cc/min) with Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger (Walbro 450 LPH primary + AEM 340 LPH secondary), Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel ethanol sensor, and Aeromotive A1000 fuel pressure regulator for E85 compatibility.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (GEN3) with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, custom-spec front sway bar (25mm solid, adjustable end links) by Cusco, and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings, rear subframe bushings) for chassis rigidity. StopTech ST-60 big brake kit (380mm 2-piece rotors, 6-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Aero: Veilside Fortune 3 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, custom rear quarter panels) with integrated carbon fiber diffuser and custom 3D-printed rear spoiler (modeled after Mazda RX-7 FD3S Type RZ). Front splitter by Rocket Bunny (polyurethane, 3-piece adjustable) with carbon fiber canards (Seibon).

Exterior: Full Respray in Mazda Soul Red Crystal (3-stage pearl) with Xpel Stealth full-body PPF and custom matte black vinyl wrap on roof, mirrors, and rear hatch. Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +25 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear).

Interior: Full Recaro Sportster CS bucket seats (front) with custom carbon fiber seat mounts, Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage (Mazdaspeed-spec, 6-point bolt-in) by Hard Dog Motorsports. Custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay (Seibon) with AiM MXS 1.2 Strada digital dash, and a custom Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub.
